content.query:
SELECT *
, '7/31/2024' as Month, case when DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], '2024-09-01') < 1 then 'Current'  
when DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], '2024-09-01') < 31 then '1 - 30'  
when DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], '2024-09-01') < 61 then '31 - 60' 
when DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], '2024-09-01') < 90 then '61 - 90'  
when DATEDIFF(DAY, [Due Date], '2024-09-01') < 181 then '91 - 180' else '180 +' end as [Age Bucket]
FROM v_AP_Aging_Test2 
where [Accounting Date] < '2024-09-01'



select *
from v_AP_Aging_Test2
where [Accounting Date] < '2024-09-05'
